summary: Comprehensive testing of Customers Tab 5 UI Fixes (Iteration 55). All 5 issues verified as FIXED: 1) Add Note visible in Overview and Notes tabs, 2) Meta/Ad info shows Lead Source section when available, 3) Notes edit/delete icons appear on hover, 4) Package cards show inspection status badges (New/Completed) with Report button for completed inspections, 5) Payment column shows single row format (Badge + amount + due). Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Payment column shows single row: [Badge] ₹amount +₹due format
Add Quick Note section visible in Overview tab with input and send button
Add Note input visible at top of Notes tab
Notes show edit (pencil) and delete (trash) icons on hover
Package cards display inspection_status badges (New, Completed, etc.)
Report button appears only for completed inspections
meta_info field returned in detailed-payments response with source, ad_id, campaign_id
seed_data_creation: Demo customers 'Rahul Sharma (Demo)' created with 3 packages (Premium, Standard, Basic) - 2 completed inspections with Report buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customers Tab 5 UI Fixes fully tested and verified. Features: 1) Payment single row format in table, 2) Add Quick Note in Overview tab + Add Note in Notes tab, 3) Meta/Lead Source section shows when customer has ad data, 4) Notes have edit/delete icons on hover, 5) Package cards show inspection_status badges with Report button for completed inspections. All backend APIs working: PUT/DELETE notes, detailed-payments with meta_info.

backend_apis.GET /api/customers/{id}/detailed-payment: PASS - Returns meta_info, packages with inspection_status, has_report
backend_apis.POST /api/customers/seed-sample-data: PASS - Creates demo customer with 3 packages

frontend_ui.Payment_Single_Row_Format: PASS - Table shows [Badge] ₹amount +₹due in single row
frontend_ui.Add_Quick_Note_Overview: PASS - '+ Add Quick Note' section with input in Overview tab
frontend_ui.Add_Note_Notes_Tab: PASS - 'Add a note...' input at top of Notes tab
frontend_ui.Notes_Edit_Delete_Icons: PASS - Edit (pencil) and Delete (trash) icons appear on hover
frontend_ui.Package_Cards: PASS - Shows package name, car info, car number, payment, status badges
frontend_ui.Inspection_Status_Badges: PASS - Shows New, Completed, Fully Paid, Partial badges
frontend_ui.Report_Button: PASS - Report button visible for completed inspections only
frontend_ui.Lead_Source_Section: PASS - Shows Lead Source with source, ad_id, campaign when available
frontend_ui.Activity_Log: PASS - Activity tab shows note_added, note_updated, note_deleted activities
